quick_facts.label: Conducting body
quick_facts.value: CMA Foundation is the entry-level examination in ICMAI’s CMA course. ICMAI is a statutory professional body constituted under the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 for regulation of the cost and management accountancy profession.

quick_facts.label: Syllabus structure
quick_facts.value: Under CMA Syllabus 2022, Foundation has four 100-mark papers: Business Laws and Business Communication; Financial and Cost Accounting; Business Mathematics and Statistics; and Business Economics and Management.

sections.heading: What CMA Foundation is for
paragraphs: CMA Foundation is ICMAI’s entry route into the professional CMA curriculum. It introduces the legal, accounting, quantitative, economic and management foundations used in later cost and management accountancy study. ICMAI describes its statutory role as regulating the cost and management accountancy profession in India under the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959.
bullets: It is a professional-course examination, rather than a university degree.
It is particularly relevant for learners seeking a structured route toward cost accounting, management accounting and related finance responsibilities.
Passing it is one route to registration at the CMA Intermediate level.

sections.heading: Subjects, assessment and passing rule
paragraphs: The current published Syllabus 2022 sets four Foundation papers, each carrying 100 marks. The published paper areas are business laws and communication; financial and cost accounting; business mathematics and statistics; and business economics and management. ICMAI states that Foundation, Intermediate and Final examinations are held twice a year on dates decided by its Council; exact dates and programme are announced term by term.
bullets: Paper 1: Fundamentals of Business Laws and Business Communication.
Paper 2: Fundamentals of Financial and Cost Accounting.
Paper 3: Fundamentals of Business Mathematics and Statistics.
Paper 4: Fundamentals of Business Economics and Management.
Pass standard: minimum 40% in every paper and 50% aggregate. The prospectus states that paper-wise exemption/carry-forward benefits are not available at Foundation level.

sections.heading: How to apply and plan around a term
paragraphs: Admission may be completed online through ICMAI’s student portal. The prospectus says applicants must provide qualification and age proof, and that admission should be completed at least four months before the examination. Examination applications are submitted online through ICMAI, with the examination fee and operational deadlines set or notified for the relevant term.
bullets: Confirm that you meet the Class 10 admission requirement and will meet the Class 12 requirement before sitting the examination.
Apply for Foundation admission through the official ICMAI student portal and retain the issued identification number.
After enrolment, submit the separate examination form by the deadline in the term-specific notification.
Treat dates and fees as variable: for example, ICMAI extended the June 2026 admission/registration cut-off to February 10, 2026; future terms require checking the latest notification.

sections.heading: Preparing with ICMAI materials
paragraphs: ICMAI states that a student admitted to Foundation has to undergo its Foundation coaching scheme. Its Syllabus 2022 page also publishes Foundation study resources, including the curriculum, study materials, practice test papers, model question papers and an MCQ bank. These official materials are the best starting point because the Institute notes that syllabus content and examination patterns can be modified through notifications.
bullets: Start with the official Syllabus 2022 curriculum and study materials for all four papers.
Use the official model and practice papers to practise full-paper timing and identify weak areas.
Give repeated practice to calculation-heavy accounting, mathematics and statistics topics, while scheduling separate revision cycles for law, economics, management and communication.
Check ICMAI notifications before the term for any syllabus, schedule or examination-process changes.

sections.heading: What passing Foundation leads to
paragraphs: A Foundation pass qualifies the student to register for CMA Intermediate, subject to ICMAI’s then-applicable registration rules. It is therefore an entry-stage milestone in the CMA pathway, not a standalone licence to practise as a Cost Accountant. ICMAI’s membership requirements are tied to passing the Final examination and meeting the specified practical-experience conditions.
bullets: Immediate academic/professional outcome: eligibility to register for CMA Intermediate.
Longer CMA route: Intermediate, Final, prescribed training and applicable membership requirements.
Foundation knowledge can complement commerce and business undergraduate study, but the Foundation pass does not replace a B.Com, BBA or another university degree.
